Bash(python -c "
from tools.fundamentals import fetch_company_profile, fetch_basic_financials, fetch_earnings
from tools.news_fetcher import fetch_company_news, extract_news_summary

DATE = '2024-01-15'
TICKER = 'AAPL'

print\('=== fetch_company_profile ==='\)
p = fetch_company_profile\(TICKER, DATE\)
print\(p\)

print\(\)
print\('=== fetch_basic_financials \(분석일: 2024-01-15, 기대: Q3 FY2023 이전 데이터\) ==='\)
f = fetch_basic_financials\(TICKER, DATE\)
print\('latest_quarter:', f.get\('latest_quarter'\)\)
print\('revenue_ttm:', f.get\('revenue_ttm'\)\)
print\('net_income_ttm:', f.get\('net_income_ttm'\)\)
print\('eps_ttm:', f.get\('eps_ttm'\)\)
print\('roe:', f.get\('roe'\), '%'\)
print\('debt_to_equity:', f.get\('debt_to_equity'\)\)
print\('revenue_growth_yoy:', f.get\('revenue_growth_yoy'\), '%'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== fetch_earnings \(2024-01-15 이전 분기\) ==='\)
e = fetch_earnings\(TICKER, DATE\)
for q in e:
    print\(' ', q\)

print\(\)
print\('=== fetch_company_news \(look-ahead bias 필터\) ==='\)
news = fetch_company_news\(TICKER, DATE, days_back=7\)
print\(f'뉴스 수: {len\(news\)} \(백테스팅 과거날짜는 0이 정상\)'\)
items = extract_news_summary\(news\)
for item in items[:3]:
    print\(' -', item.get\('datetime',''\)[:10], item.get\('headline',''\)[:60]\)
" 2>&1)

import yfinance as yf, pandas as pd
t = yf.Ticker\('AAPL'\)
qf = t.quarterly_financials
print\('yfinance가 현재 제공하는 분기:'\)
for col in qf.columns:
    ts = pd.Timestamp\(col\)
    if ts.tz: ts = ts.tz_localize\(None\)
    print\(f'  {ts.date\(\)}'\)
print\(\)
print\('→ 2024-09-30 분기 데이터가 없음 \(5Q 한계\)'\)
" 2>&1)
